root_cause: Node-local CNI initialization failure is blocking workload pod networking
evidence: Recognized node-local CNI pod 'aws-node-7bk2h' on node 'worker-7' has failing init container 'install-cni' with state=waiting restartCount=6
Timeline shows 5 effective CNI-init-failure -> workload-network-block occurrence(s) within the last 30 minutes
Representative CNI init failure: Back-off restarting failed container install-cni in pod aws-node-7bk2h_kube-system

Representative workload symptom: Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "3cb53a20": plugin type="aws-cni" failed (add): failed to load CNI config file /etc/cni/net.d/10-aws.conflist: no such file or directory

causes.message: Assigned node 'worker-7' relies on node-local CNI pod 'aws-node-7bk2h' to bootstrap pod networking
CNI init container 'install-cni' failed before node-local network bootstrap completed
Workload pod 'checkout-api-7b9d9c8d5f-bx2qp' later failed sandbox network setup on the same node

node:worker-7: A node-local CNI daemon failed during init/bootstrap before workload pod networking could be set up
pod:aws-node-7bk2h: Back-off restarting failed container install-cni in pod aws-node-7bk2h_kube-system
pod:checkout-api-7b9d9c8d5f-bx2qp: Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "3cb53a20": plugin type="aws-cni" failed (add): failed to load CNI config file /etc/cni/net.d/10-aws.conflist: no such file or directory

likely_causes: The node-local CNI DaemonSet could not finish its install/bootstrap step on the affected node
The init container failed to render or copy CNI config or binaries under /etc/cni/net.d or the node plugin path
A hostPath mount, permission issue, or image/problem in the CNI init container left the node without usable CNI bootstrap artifacts
New workload pods on that node are blocked until the node-local CNI pod completes init successfully
suggested_checks: kubectl get pods -n kube-system -o wide | findstr worker-7
